title: Node marked active despite amendment pending notification
problem: CGST-R19(1) has status "active" but amendment marker [3] indicates "Inserted (w.e.f. yet to be notified)" per Notification No. 7/2025-CT, dated 23.01.2025. The enacted_date 2025-01-23 is recorded but effective_date is null, correctly reflecting the pending state. However, the node's status remains "active" when it should be "pending" to accurately reflect that the inserted text (FORM GST CMP-02 reference) has not yet been notified into force.
evidence_refs: hint_amendment marker=3: '3. Inserted (w.e.f. yet to be notified) vide Notification No. 7/2025 -CT., dated 23.01.2025.' with effective_date: null, enacted_date: '2025-01-23'
Target node CGST-R19(1): status=active, amendment_markers=[3], effective_from=null
Source block 2: contains <sup>3</sup>[or in the intimation furnished by the composition taxpayer in FORM GST CMP-02]
recommended_fix: Change CGST-R19(1).status from 'active' to 'pending'. The enacted_date alone does not establish operative effect; the explicit 'yet to be notified' qualifier confirms the amendment is not yet in force. Alternatively, if the extraction system handles pending amendments by keeping status=active, ensure a corresponding effective_from field is null as currently recorded and consider adding a chronological note explaining the pending status.

title: source_ref anchor_text truncated, omitting operative tail
problem: The source_ref.anchor_text for CGST-R19(4) only contains 'Where the reply furnished under sub-rule (3) is found to be not satisfactory or where no reply is furnished in response to the notice issued under sub-rule (2) ' — it stops at sub-rule (2) and omits the remainder 'within the period prescribed in sub-rule (3), the proper officer shall reject the application submitted under sub-rule (1) and pass an order in FORM GST REG-05.' The anchor_text thus fails to cover the full block span and drops the operative consequence (rejection of application) that is central to the sub-rule's scope.
evidence_refs: source block 16: full text includes 'within the period prescribed in sub-rule (3), the proper officer shall reject the application submitted under sub-rule (1) and pass an order in FORM GST REG-05'
rule_json target card text: complete sub-rule text preserved correctly
recommended_fix: Update source_ref.anchor_text to capture the complete block text, or set source_ref to null if only a fragment is available and raw_text cannot faithfully represent the full source. The anchor_text must cover the entire source span for CGST-R19(4) to serve as a reliable audit trail.
